ddls:
CREATE TABLE "patients" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "patient_name" TEXT /* Name of the patient */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the patient */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the patient */,
  "red_value" REAL /* Red component value of blood color */,
  "green_value" REAL /* Green component value of blood color */,
  "blue_value" REAL /* Blue component value of blood color */,
  "hemoglobin_level" REAL /* Hemoglobin level in grams per deciliter (g/dl) */,
  "date_of_exam" TEXT /* Date when the hematology data was collected */,
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the laboratory where the data was collected */,
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Identifier for the doctor who ordered the test */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the patient or test results */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_doctor_id FOREIGN KEY ("doctor_id") REFERENCES doctors ("doctor_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patients_lab_id FOREIGN KEY ("lab_id") REFERENCES laboratories ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, clinician, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for user authentication */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "laboratories" (
  "lab_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each laboratory */,
  "lab_name" TEXT /* Name of the laboratory */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the laboratory */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the laboratory */,
  "contact_phone" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the laboratory */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the laboratory record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the laboratory record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("lab_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "doctors" (
  "doctor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each doctor */,
  "doctor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the doctor */,
  "specialty" TEXT /* Medical specialty of the doctor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the doctor */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the doctor */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the doctor record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the doctor record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("doctor_id")
)
